summary: The user sought book recommendations similar to "The Nightingale" by Kristin Hannah and decided to read "All the Light We Cannot See" by Anthony Doerr. The user also discussed recent sleep troubles and shared changes to their bedtime routine that have been helping improve their sleep quality.
facts: The user is reading "All the Light We Cannot See" by Anthony Doerr. The user has been having trouble sleeping for about three weeks. The user has been getting ready for bed around 10-10:30 PM. The user has been limiting caffeine intake in the afternoons, previously enjoying coffee or tea around 4-5 PM. The user has been reading for at least 20-30 minutes every night before bed to help wind down. The user finds that reading fiction helps them relax more than non-fiction. The user has noticed improvements in sleep quality and feels more refreshed in the mornings since starting their reading routine.
